message:
feat(unicode): Expand BiDi API with display reordering and refactoring

New public functions:
- get_base_direction(): Detect paragraph direction from first strong char
- get_bidi_embedding_levels(): Return per-char embedding levels only
- reorder_for_display(): Apply UAX #9 visual reordering with bracket mirroring

Refactoring:
- resolve_bidi() now delegates to new helpers for clarity
- detect_base_direction() renamed to public get_base_direction()
- Bracket mirroring covers ()[]{}«»‹› for RTL runs

The expanded API supports:
1. Simple direction detection (get_base_direction)
2. Raw embedding levels for custom renderers (get_bidi_embedding_levels)
3. Full visual reordering for display (reorder_for_display)
4. Combined info struct (resolve_bidi, existing behavior)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
